failures.description: The agent misread or misreasoned over the ProductCatalogSearch output, choosing item 1507389580 at $1157.86 even though item 5339029584 at $1128.99 was cheaper and available.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the cheapest available Smartphone. The tool call at index 3 returned two available smartphones sorted by ascending price: item 5339029584 at $1128.99, then item 1507389580 at $1157.86. At index 4, the Executor used this relevant tool output but selected the more expensive second item as the cheapest. This directly contradicts the tool result and was not resolved later; the Evaluator at index 5 reinforced the same incorrect conclusion.
